name: onboard-node
description: Onboard a Node.js developer onto a codebase (JavaScript or TypeScript) by systematically mining the project. Single skill (`onboard-node`) that runs a phased workflow — Phase 1 orient, Phase 2 scope, Phase 3 mine six areas (build/local-dev, architecture, security, observability, CI/CD, code quality), Phase 4 questions, Phase 5 report. All analysis details live in internal reference files; no user-invokable sub-skills.
